title: [RSO_Call for Proposals_September 2, 2024] Duke Bass Connections 2025-2026 – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
[RSO_Call for Proposals_September 2, 2024] Duke Bass Connections 2025-2026
Duke University is calling for proposals for Duke Bass Connections 2025-2026 Project Teams.
You can visit the website for more information: Project Proposal Guidelines for 2025-2026 Project Teams | Duke Bass Connections. All projects must have at least one Duke faculty as the project team PI to submit the proposal.
Budget total: $10,000 to $30,000. You need to discuss the budget for your subcontract from the Duke Bass Connections project with the Duke PI.
Priority Areas:
Brain & Society
Energy & Environment
Global Health
Health Policy & Innovation
Information, Society & Culture
Race & Society
Bass Connections Open
Project Period: 1 year
Eligibility: N/A
Language: English
Internal Deadline: 5:00 pm, Monday, 4 November 2024 (E.S.T., Durham local time)
If you are interested in the Duke Bass Connection Program, please check out the details through the link to Proposal Guidelines.
Please reach out to the Duke faculty PI to discuss the joint application if there are any research topics you both are interested in. Please discuss the statement of work and the budget of the sub-award for the Duke Bass Connections project with the Duke PI.
